microsoft_ft: Scaled Azure's recovery validation program from a 2-person operation into a **platformized system**, standardizing data pipelines and workflows to sustain 45+ annual resilience drills and drive **$14M+ business impact** across enterprise customers including Databricks, Walmart, SAP,

Led **0→1 development** of an internal Resilience Automation Platform, defining product requirements and self-service scheduling capabilities that reduced operational toil by 30% and transitioned execution to a scalable, agentic orchestration model usable across partner teams.

Pioneered Azure's first proactive resilience testing capability, delivering a rack-level drill program in 4 months with a **94% recovery rate**, surfacing critical hardware defects and establishing a repeatable validation framework adopted across sovereign-cloud deployments.

Directed **14 cross-org recovery executions** under executive visibility, including serving as bridge lead for a sovereign-cloud network isolation test tied to a $1.5B+ enterprise contract, owning all technical and stakeholder communication end to end.

Built an internal **AI agent** to automate drill planning workflows, restructuring orchestration logic to reduce planning cycle time by 39% and increase drill capacity by 21%, acting as field signal for which agent behaviors to productize across the platform.

Shaped the product roadmap toward intent-based YAML generation by conducting **11+ discovery interviews** with Azure service teams, surfacing critical pipeline feature gaps and translating raw customer pain into prioritized, agentic-workflow requirements.

Improved **data integrity and retrieval** across internal documentation by implementing rigorous metadata validation standards and migrating to an AI-powered semantic search layer, cutting lookup time by 83% and ensuring trusted outputs before stakeholders saw dashboards.
microsoft_2022: Generated **$3M in accelerated revenue** and launched regions 28% faster by securing cross-functional alignment on a unified automation prioritization framework, standardizing data models and workflows across 140+ engineering teams with no existing playbook.

Ran deep **discovery with 20+ service teams** to map 81 hours of manual effort per region launch, then built and socialized a roadmap to automate critical data paths — mirroring the FDE motion of scoping what good looks like before writing a line of transformation logic.

Engineered a **Power BI dashboard** tracking operational toil and pipeline health across 140+ teams, giving leadership a trusted, validated data layer to target automation gaps and drive land-and-expand decisions across the region launch program.

Facilitated Agile ceremonies across sprint planning and retrospectives, **prioritizing 40+ high-severity tickets** and stabilizing the developer intake process — demonstrating the structured, fast-cycle delivery cadence required to get customers to real value in days, not quarters.

Drove alignment across IT, Operations, and Engineering to implement **automated CI/CD pipelines**, accelerating the software deployment cycle by 25% and systemizing previously ad-hoc workflows into repeatable, production-grade orchestration patterns.
pro_painters: Increased job bookings by **26%** by owning the end-to-end customer onboarding and scoping lifecycle for 200+ monthly proposals, building a CRM workflow that standardized first-party data capture and gave leadership a clean, trusted pipeline to act on.

Reduced **Customer Acquisition Cost by 13%** and boosted conversion rate by 2.7% by executing a digital-first go-to-market strategy — running discovery with owners, making the ROI case for channel investment, and optimizing web and search presence to drive measurable attribution.

Built leadership's pricing model by conducting **financial profitability analysis** across 1,000+ project records, identifying margin leaks and translating raw transactional data into actionable unit-economics insights that directly informed campaign and capacity decisions.
